sys_ui_action.comments:
2.8.0 | 2022-06-07 | raj | STRY0122882 - Publish Task(s) button- New Modal to 'Choose Which Tasks to Publish' 2.7.2 | 2022-02-04 | raj | DFCT0010781 - Publishing task tree from DRAFT show too many notification (moved the info message into the ui action so it isn't called for all sub tasks)
2.7 STRY0105845 - DIA- Draft Scheduled Tasks- Create Draft Task State
sys_ui_action.name: Publish Task(s)
